title: InspectStartOffset Property
description: Sets / returns the start inspection offset.
notes:
When inspecting a line or arc, you may not always want to inspect the entire line.  Use InspectEndOffset and InspectStartOffset to specify the portion of the line or arc you want to inspect.

For LineInspector, the offsets are in pixels.
  For ArcInspector, the offsets are in degrees.

See Also: InspectStartOffset Property

InspectEndOffset Property
